Donkey
Scarlet Brotherhood Sword

When attacking, has a [20%-22%] chance of restoring [9%-11%] health in self.
Once in a while, sets the target of the attack and 3 enemies closest to it on fire. The burning units take 180000 magic damage and have their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec. If a unit set on fire by a sword ability dies within 3 sec, they can't be resurrected for 3 sec. When the burning wears off, enemies set on fire take 100000 pure damage.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
